title: Skills：基于文件系统的领域专长，按需加载
title_en: Skills: Filesystem-Based Domain Expertise Loaded On-Demand

body.concept: Skills 是存储在文件系统中的可复用资源，为 Claude 提供特定领域的专长——包括工作流程、背景知识和最佳实践。它们把一个通用 agent 变成某个领域的专家。Skills 在需要时自动加载，不占用常驻 context。你只需创建一次，之后在任何对话中都能自动生效。
body.analogy: 想象一个医生的工具箱：听诊器、血压计各有专用。医生不会随身携带所有设备，而是根据病人症状取用对应工具。Skills 就像这些专科工具——平时不占空间，需要时自动出现，让通用医生变成专科医生。
body.visual: 一个工具架：左边是通用的 Claude agent，中间是标注了不同领域的 Skill 文件（如 TDD、debugging、frontend），右边的箭头指向一个戴着专家帽子的 Claude。标题：'按需装载，即刻专精'。

body_en.concept: Skills are reusable, filesystem-based resources that give Claude domain-specific expertise: workflows, context, and best practices that transform a general-purpose agent into a specialist. They load on-demand—only when relevant—so they don't consume constant context. Create once, use automatically across conversations.
body_en.analogy: Think of a doctor's toolkit: stethoscope, blood pressure cuff, each specialized. The doctor doesn't carry everything at once—they grab the right instrument based on symptoms. Skills work the same way: they sit on the shelf until needed, then automatically appear to turn a generalist into a specialist.
body_en.visual: A tool rack: on the left, a generic Claude agent; in the middle, Skill files labeled for different domains (TDD, debugging, frontend); on the right, an arrow pointing to Claude wearing a specialist hat. Caption: 'Load on demand, specialize instantly.'
